name: vue-tui-monorepo
description: Vue 3 terminal UI framework. Build AI agent interfaces and TUI apps with Yoga flexbox.

scripts.visual:basic-template: vp run @vue-tui/runtime#build && vp run @vue-tui/example-basic-template#build && vp run @vue-tui/tui-visual-review#start
scripts.visual:fullscreen-origin: vp run @vue-tui/runtime#build && vp run @vue-tui/components#build && vp run @vue-tui/tui-visual-review#fullscreen-origin
scripts.visual:scroll-box: vp run @vue-tui/runtime#build && vp run @vue-tui/components#build && vp run @vue-tui/example-scroll-box#build && vp run @vue-tui/tui-visual-review#scroll-box
scripts.visual:spinner: vp run @vue-tui/runtime#build && vp run @vue-tui/components#build && vp run @vue-tui/tui-visual-review#spinner
scripts.visual:basic-template:smoke: vp run @vue-tui/runtime#build && vp run @vue-tui/example-basic-template#build && vp run @vue-tui/tui-visual-review#smoke
scripts.ready: vp run check:fmt && vp run build && vp run check:lint && vp run check:type && vp run verify:package-consumer && vp run test
